description_long: This cabin features a modern, angular design with a prominent asymmetrical shed roof that extends over two main sections connected by an open central breezeway. The exterior is clad in dark wood panels, giving it a contemporary yet rustic appearance. The structure is elevated on short stilts, providing a raised foundation and a small staircase leading up to the main entrance. Windows are symmetrically placed on the front-facing sections, each with a rectangular shape and dark trim. The open central area creates a semi-enclosed porch or gathering space, enhancing the cabin's social and functional appeal. The overall form and materials suggest a blend of modern and traditional influences suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A modern, elevated wooden cabin with an asymmetrical shed roof, open central breezeway, and symmetrical front windows. The structure combines rustic wood cladding with contemporary architectural lines.
description_view_0: The cabin is viewed from the narrow end, showing the deep overhang of the shed roof and the raised foundation with visible stilts.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front facade, revealing the open central breezeway, symmetrical windows on each side, and the staircase leading to the entrance.
description_view_2: The rear of the cabin is visible, showing the back wall and the continuation of the shed roof, with minimal window or door features.
description_view_3: A side perspective displays the elongated roofline, the open breezeway, and the wood-paneled exterior of both main sections.
attribute_roof_type: asymmetrical shed roof with deep overhangs and a single continuous slope
attribute_window_arrangement: Two medium-sized rectangular windows symmetrically placed on the front facade, one on each side of the central breezeway, with no visible windows on the rear or sides
attribute_door_placement: Single main door located at the center of the front facade, accessed via a staircase and opening into the central breezeway
